x-enumeration-literals.name: Bank
x-enumeration-literals.description: The bank implements and follows compliance policies to meet legal, regulatory, or internal requirements

x-enumeration-literals.name: Compliance Officer
x-enumeration-literals.description: The person responsible for monitoring, managing, and enforcing compliance within the organization or bank.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Regulatory Authority
x-enumeration-literals.description: Government or official bodies that set rules, conduct inspections, and enforce compliance with laws and regulations.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Auditor
x-enumeration-literals.description: Persons or teams that review, assess, and report on compliance adherence.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Monitored Party
x-enumeration-literals.description: Individuals, business units, or accounts subject to compliance checks.
